color: rgb(17, 24, 39) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(16, 32, 51) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Provenance
source URL, repo, file path, anchors, hashes

div.style: color: rgb(16, 32, 51) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(16, 42, 16) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Execution and validation
status, materialized circuit, OpenQASM, failure class

div.style: color: rgb(16, 42, 16) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Circuit structure
qubits, gates, depth, topology, measurements

div.style: color: rgb(16, 42, 16) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Gate-set and complexity
Clifford/T, rotations, entanglement, parameterization

div.style: color: rgb(16, 42, 16) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Benchmark readiness
n/7 and n/8 checks, tiers, cleaning flags

div.style: color: rgb(34, 17, 47) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Metadata-design overlay
release, split, evidence, stance, governance

div.style: color: rgb(48, 32, 0) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Instruction generation
seed role, prompt type, model, template, lineage

div.style: color: rgb(16, 42, 16) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Semantic metrics
BERTScore, sentence similarity, BLEU, ROUGE-L, edit distance

div.style: color: rgb(34, 17, 47) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Release metadata
license category, release bucket, export profile
